title: Pungent Tender Australian Mincemeat Fritters
description: Indulgent Australian dish featuring mincemeat, these fritters are pungent and tender, perfect for a snack or dessert. They are Jain-friendly and can be enjoyed by everyone.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the mincemeat, flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together the chopped onion and minced garlic.
Add the onion and garlic mixture to the mincemeat mixture and stir until well combined.
Gradually add the vegetable oil and water to the mixture, stirring until a thick batter forms.
Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil, about 1/4 cupfuls.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the fritters warm, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
